name: choice-properties
description: Static site for Cloudflare Pages. Backend is Supabase (cloud). Replit is used for CODE EDITING ONLY — nothing runs here.

scripts.start: echo 'ERROR: This is a static site. There is no local server. Deploy via Cloudflare Pages.' && exit 1
scripts.dev: echo 'ERROR: This is a static site. There is no local server. Deploy via Cloudflare Pages.' && exit 1
scripts.preinstall: echo 'WARNING: No npm install needed. This is a static site edited in Replit and deployed to Cloudflare Pages.'

nota_bene: express was a legacy dependency and is no longer used. Do not install or run anything here.
